docket_entries.description: ORDER ENTERING JUDGNMENT FOLLOWING DEFAULT UNDER TERMS OF SETTLEMENT AGREMENT [CCP 664.6]
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT DEUFAMIA, ROBERT DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
